arts.ttl: Journalist claims Daniel Cummings on radar of a 'number' of clubs amid Celtic contract situation
arts.sum: According to journalist Pete O’Rourke on X, Celtic B striker Daniel Cummings is attracting the interest of several English clubs amid his excellent form under Stephen McManus this term. With his potential future availability for a small compensation fee lingering, Celtic will want to secure his future if clubs are indeed monitoring the free-scoring forward.

arts.ttl: Celtic midfielder is really grasping extra responsibility as pundit spots key change
arts.sum: Celtic midfielder Reo Hatate scored his first Champions League goal on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers clears up Alex Valle 'rumours' as Celtic loanee continues to establish himself
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers addressed rumours surrounding Alex Valle yesterday in his pre-Kilmarnock press conference. Brendan Rodgers on Alex Valle’s loan situation

arts.ttl: Celtic receive indisputable evidence of ear-damaging racket as Fortress Paradise rips up the record books
arts.sum: The Hoops won an epic Euro encounter against the Germans and the noise levels off the scale

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton salutes superb Reo Hatate as he shares the change he's noticed in him at Celtic
arts.sum: Chris Sutton salutes Celtic star Reo Hatate amid Leipzig display He explained: “Four Champions League games so far and Hatate has started in three of them.

arts.ttl: 'Alexandro Bernabei is a sensation' - Celtic outcast evolves into £8m superstar amid shout to cap him for BRAZIL
arts.sum: The 24-year-old failed to hit the heights in Glasgow but they are going nuts for him in Brazil

arts.ttl: Bernabei 'proving a sensation' away from Celtic and even touted for wrong country
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei provided an assist during their recent 2-0 win.

arts.ttl: Celtic risk losing teen striker Cummings - gossip
arts.sum: Celtic boss repeats wish to retain services of defender as English clubs circle teen talent.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel makes Celtic clean and clinical plea as keeper shuts down Leicester Champions League repeat talk
arts.sum: The experienced keeper says there's no chance anyone at Celtic Park will get carried away with Tuesday's Champions League victory over RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Reo Hatate is an outrageous Celtic talent but there's something else I've noticed about star man – Chris Sutton
arts.sum: The Parkhead hero pays tribute to the fan favourite who was front and centre and dominating games at Europe’s highest level.
